name: prose-as-code: an ADR proposing 0.0.0.0/0 ingress is flagged by enforce with no Terraform present
command:
mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0050. Dev cluster

## Decision

We will leave dev-cluster ingress unrestricted (0.0.0.0/0).
' > docs/adr/0050.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce.sh" --root . --rule g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress
